assertionResults.fullName: Authentication API (/api/v1/auth) POST /api/v1/auth/login should authenticate user and return JWT with username
assertionResults.title: should authenticate user and return JWT with username

assertionResults.fullName: Authentication API (/api/v1/auth) POST /api/v1/auth/login should authenticate user and return JWT with email
assertionResults.title: should authenticate user and return JWT with email

assertionResults.fullName: Authentication API (/api/v1/auth) POST /api/v1/auth/login should fail with invalid password
assertionResults.title: should fail with invalid password

assertionResults.fullName: Authentication API (/api/v1/auth) POST /api/v1/auth/login should fail with non-existent user
assertionResults.title: should fail with non-existent user

assertionResults.fullName: Authentication API (/api/v1/auth) POST /api/v1/auth/login should fail with VALIDATION_FAILED for empty credentials
assertionResults.title: should fail with VALIDATION_FAILED for empty credentials

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Initial Auth setup should login static student and admin to get tokens
assertionResults.title: should login static student and admin to get tokens

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) POST /api/v1/users/register should register a new student
assertionResults.title: should register a new student

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) POST /api/v1/users/register should fail if unauthenticated (401)
assertionResults.title: should fail if unauthenticated (401)

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) POST /api/v1/users/register should fail if not an admin (403)
assertionResults.title: should fail if not an admin (403)

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) POST /api/v1/users/register should fail with EMAIL_ALREADY_TAKEN
assertionResults.title: should fail with EMAIL_ALREADY_TAKEN

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) POST /api/v1/users/register should fail with USERNAME_ALREADY_TAKEN
assertionResults.title: should fail with USERNAME_ALREADY_TAKEN

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) POST /api/v1/users/register should fail with VALIDATION_FAILED for invalid input
assertionResults.title: should fail with VALIDATION_FAILED for invalid input

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access GET /api/v1/users/me should get current user profile for static student
assertionResults.title: should get current user profile for static student

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access GET /api/v1/users/me should fail without token (401)
assertionResults.title: should fail without token (401)

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access GET /api/v1/users/{id} should get user details when ID matches current user
assertionResults.title: should get user details when ID matches current user

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access GET /api/v1/users/{id} should deny access if ID does not match and not ADMIN (403)
assertionResults.title: should deny access if ID does not match and not ADMIN (403)

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access GET /api/v1/users/{id} should allow access if ADMIN
assertionResults.title: should allow access if ADMIN

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access GET /api/v1/users/{id} should return 404 for non-existent user if ADMIN
assertionResults.title: should return 404 for non-existent user if ADMIN

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access PUT /api/v1/users/{id} should update user profile
assertionResults.title: should update user profile

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access PUT /api/v1/users/{id} should fail with VALIDATION_FAILED for invalid input
assertionResults.title: should fail with VALIDATION_FAILED for invalid input

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access PUT /api/v1/users/{id} should fail with EMAIL_ALREADY_TAKEN when updating to an existing email
assertionResults.title: should fail with EMAIL_ALREADY_TAKEN when updating to an existing email

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access PUT /api/v1/users/{id} should fail with USERNAME_ALREADY_TAKEN when updating to an existing username
assertionResults.title: should fail with USERNAME_ALREADY_TAKEN when updating to an existing username

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access PUT /api/v1/users/{id} should deny student from updating another profile (403)
assertionResults.title: should deny student from updating another profile (403)

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access PUT /api/v1/users/{id} should allow admin to update another profile
assertionResults.title: should allow admin to update another profile

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access PUT /api/v1/users/{id}/password should change password
assertionResults.title: should change password

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access PUT /api/v1/users/{id}/password should fail with INVALID_CREDENTIALS if old password is wrong
assertionResults.title: should fail with INVALID_CREDENTIALS if old password is wrong

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access PUT /api/v1/users/{id}/password should fail with VALIDATION_FAILED for empty passwords
assertionResults.title: should fail with VALIDATION_FAILED for empty passwords

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access PUT /api/v1/users/{id}/password should deny student from changing another user password (403)
assertionResults.title: should deny student from changing another user password (403)

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access POST /api/v1/users/admin should deny student from creating an admin (403)
assertionResults.title: should deny student from creating an admin (403)

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access POST /api/v1/users/admin should allow admin to create an admin (201)
assertionResults.title: should allow admin to create an admin (201)

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access POST /api/v1/users/admin should fail with EMAIL_ALREADY_TAKEN for admin creation
assertionResults.title: should fail with EMAIL_ALREADY_TAKEN for admin creation

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access POST /api/v1/users/admin should fail with VALIDATION_FAILED for invalid admin input
assertionResults.title: should fail with VALIDATION_FAILED for invalid admin input

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access DELETE /api/v1/users/{id} should deny student from deleting another user profile (403)
assertionResults.title: should deny student from deleting another user profile (403)

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access DELETE /api/v1/users/{id} should allow admin to delete user profile
assertionResults.title: should allow admin to delete user profile

assertionResults.fullName: Users API (/api/v1/users) Authentication & Profile Access DELETE /api/v1/users/{id} should return 404 when deleting already deleted user
assertionResults.title: should return 404 when deleting already deleted user
